logOut.title: Log out
logOut.alertDescription: Are you sure you want to log out?

firstAlert.alertDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

secondAlert.alertDescription: This is your last chance to cancel. Do you really want to delete your account?

aboutUs.title: About us
aboutUs.creditsDescription: This application uses data from the following sources

privacyError.description: The privacy form is not available in your region.

loginSentences.1: There's a seat waiting for you.
loginSentences.2: Your entertainment inventory, in one place.
loginSentences.3: Mark your page. Save your world.
loginSentences.4: Your life, your ranking, your TopFive.

loginNotification.title: Welcome!
loginNotification.description: You have been logged in successfully.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailNotRegistered: The email is not registered. Create an account or verify the email entered.
forgotPassword.emailSent: You will receive an email with instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorEmailSent: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.

success.title: Account created
success.description:
Your account has been created successfully. 
 Check your email and confirm your account.

errors.passwordMismatch: The passwords do not match. Please try again.
errors.general: There was an error creating your account.

error.errorLink: The link has expired or is incomplete. Please, request a new one.
error.passwordMismatch: The passwords do not match. Please try again.
error.general: The password could not be updated. The link might have expired.
error.differentPassword: The new password must be different from the previous one.
error.rateLimit: You have exceeded the limit for password change. Please, wait a couple of minutes.

resetPassword.successDescription: The password was changed successfully. You can sign in now.

search.description: Perform a search to see results for {{category}}.
search.usersScreenDescription: Perform a search to find users.

collection.noLists: You don't have any {{category}} lists created.

deleteListNotification.title: Delete list
deleteListNotification.description: Are you sure you want to remove this list from your collection?
deleteListNotification.confirmationDescription: The list {{listName}} has been deleted successfully.

listCreatedNotification.title: List created
listCreatedNotification.description: The list {{listName}} has been created successfully.

list.couldntCreateError: Could not create the list. Please try again.

deleteItemFromListNotification.title: Delete from list
deleteItemFromListNotification.description: Are you sure you want to remove this item from the list?
deleteItemFromListNotification.confirmationDescription: The item has been deleted from the list.

home.noCompletedReviewsFromFriends: You don't have any friends with reviews.
home.addFriendsToSeeReviews: Add friends to read their reviews.

deleteFollowers.description: Do you want to remove {{username}} from your followers?

deleteFollowing.errorDescription: Could not unfollow {{username}}. Please, try again.
